facebook.caption:
4.3 stars. 210 reviews. And most tourists still walk right past Mussel Beach grooves.

This is one of those Phu Quoc spots that earns its rating quietly. No big resort backing it. Just real feedback from real visitors who made the detour.

If 210 people took the time to rate it, it's worth putting on your map.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
